import numpy as np
import statistics

class ShakespeareanSonnet:
    def __init__(self, dataset):
        self.dataset = dataset
        self.mean = np.mean(dataset)
        self.median = statistics.median(dataset)
        self.stddev = np.std(dataset)
        self.outliers = [x for x in dataset if abs(x - self.mean) > 2 * self.stddev]
